entries.description: Operator set pathAwareCritique: advisory.

Registered S1 (claude/anthropic/claude-fable-5); read spec, Set 095 evidence corpus (s1-cross-round-ledger.md, issues rounds), L-095-1, and current verify_session/verification/verification_stamp/template code. Scratch worktree for the fan-out replay created at C:/temp/replay-095 @ b16dd58.

Fan-out experiment run: frozen 095 pre-close corpus (worktree @ b16dd58, diff-base 34d4149), identical 130k-char bundles; K=3 gpt-5-6 discovery calls (3+4, 3+7, 1+5 issues+nits) + 1 gemini-3-1-pro cross-provider call (VERIFIED, 0 findings); \.80 total (budget \). Raw artifacts s1-fanout-run-{a,b,c,d}.md + s1-fanout-findings.json; overlap/sizing analysis routed (task_type=analysis).

Consequence rubric (L-095-1, operator 2026-07-12) encoded in verification.md Severity anchoring + mandatory per-Issue Failure scenario line; merge-decision anchor and anti-laundering escalation preserved subordinated to the rubric; TEMPLATE_ID bumped to session-verification-v3 with new pinned hash (v1/v2 retained).

Parser: tolerant failureScenario extraction in _parse_issue_blocks (classify_blocking unchanged); session-issues.schema.json + session-issues-schema.md gain the optional verifier-emitted failureScenario field (both schema versions, additive).

verify_session auto-assembles the settled-points cross-round ledger from prior rounds sN-issues*.json + sN-remediation-round-<R>.md sidecars and prepends it to the prompt (no-resurrection framing; explicit unreadable-artifact reporting; truncation markers); sidecar added to WORK_DIFF_SET_BOOKKEEPING; targeted tests green (305 passed: framing/rubric pins, parser, ledger assembly, stamp, run wiring).

Full suite green: pytest 2948 passed / 6 skipped (+26 new tests vs 095 baseline); extension Layer 2 1487 passing (untouched surfaces); tsc --noEmit clean. Playwright not required per L-064-12 scope (no Explorer/state-writer/fixture change).

Round 1 (gpt-5-6, v3 template) returned 1 Major with a parsed failureScenario (field works end-to-end): ledger applied settled/no-resurrection framing without settlement evidence. ACCEPTED + fixed fail-closed (earned settlement: settling resolution_status or non-empty round sidecar; unresolved block otherwise). Sidecar s1-remediation-round-1.md written (dogfoods the convention); targeted tests 163 green; re-verify round 2 next.

Round 2 VERIFIED clean under the auto-assembled ledger (2 rounds, \.37 total verification). Disposition authored (completed / api / VERIFIED; next_orchestrator claude-code/anthropic/claude-sonnet-5/medium per routed rec; 095-tutorial latent Majors recorded as deferred_issues). Committing, pushing, closing.
close_session succeeded (all gates PASS; Set 084 backstop re-verified post-disposition tree: round 3 VERIFIED, \.17). Close-out artifacts committed + pushed; notification firing.

Registered S2 (claude/anthropic/claude-fable-5); read spec S2 plan, S1 fan-out experiment memo (K=2 same-model sizing, provider-diversity as preference knob), and shipped state: verify_session.py (ledger machinery), verification.py (parser + classify_blocking), template v3 (consequence rubric), router-config.yaml verification block, workflow doc Step 6/7.

Phase modes shipped in verify_session: --phase discovery (fan-out K from config, identical bundles, per-call stamps/artifacts, merged envelope with discoveryCall + discoveryBaselineTree snapshot), --phase supplementary (completeness-critic block replaces ledger; cross-provider preference knob degrades loudly), --phase remediation-review (tree-to-tree fix delta from recorded baseline + auto-ledger; parse_fix_verdicts into envelope fixVerdicts). Framings ride the Original Task slot so the v3 template pin holds. Compat: no --phase = classic single call. parse_fix_verdicts added to verification.py.

router-config.yaml verification.discovery seeded verbatim from the S1 memo: fan_out: 2, provider_diversity: same-model, documented inline; loader clamps to [1,4] and fails open to defaults. Tests: 48 new (test_verify_session_phases.py) + 74 existing pass; full suite 2988 passed / 6 skipped.

Loop policy rewritten: workflow doc Step 6 gained "The phased loop (Set 096)" (discovery -> supplementary -> remediate-once -> remediation-review; bounded totals <=2 discovery passes / <=2 review cycles; severity gate + operator round-cap authority preserved verbatim); Materiality items 3-4 updated (auto-assembled ledger, phased bounds); Step 7 blocking list restructured (supplementary-before-remediation, sidecar, phase-aware re-verify). Echo sweep (L-065-1): overview diagram, constitution Step 6/7 + Recovery bounded-round language, verification-surface-strategy Set-071 recap note. session-issues-schema.md + session-issues.schema.json extended (phase/discoveryBaselineTree/fixVerdicts envelope fields, per-issue discoveryCall) with 9 new schema tests; Lightweight Mode-B 1-2/3+ bound intentionally unchanged. Preload ceilings all OK (constitution 75%).

Convergence replay run end-to-end through the shipped --phase machinery on the frozen 095 corpus (scratch worktree @ b16dd58, diff-base 34d4149, scratch set 096-s2-replay so stamps can never corroborate this session). Result: 4 rounds / $0.85 / one remediation batch + one micro-fix -> VERIFIED with 6/6 fix verdicts accepted, exactly at the bounded totals (2 discovery passes + 2 remediation-review cycles) vs 095 baseline 17 non-converging rounds / $4.88. Discovery K=2 harvested 4 disjoint Majors; supplementary added 1 new (0 re-reports); remediation-review caught 1 fix-induced in-hunk defect. Memo: s2-convergence-replay.md; raw artifacts s2-replay-*; remediation preserved as s2-replay-fix.patch for the operator (095 deliverable fixes stay operator-scheduled). Worktree removed.

Release prep: CHANGELOG 0.33.0 Unreleased block (S1 entries + S2 phased-loop Added/Changed, replay falsifier in the header); pyproject 0.32.0 -> 0.33.0; stale __init__ __version__ fallback 0.27.0 -> 0.33.0 aligned (stamp fallback correctness); editable install refreshed (0.33.0; note: bare pip shim silently no-ops, python -m pip works). Entry point proven: verify_session --phase discovery parses + dry-runs on this set. Full suite: 2996 passed / 6 skipped. Publish stays operator-gated.

Mandatory verification, dogfooding the phased loop: R1 discovery K=2 ($0.64, 9 blocking findings, disjoint call sets) -> R2 supplementary ($0.34, 1 new: unparseable-findings deadlock) -> remediated all 8 distinct (fail-closed merge; bookkeeping excludes via WORK_DIFF_SET_BOOKKEEPING; fix-rejected escalation; cycle-cap suspend; replay-claim qualifiers; supplementary session-verdict fail-close; zero-parse envelope synthesis) -> R3 review ($0.09, 10/11... wait 2 rejected) -> R4 cycle 2 ($0.08, 10/11 accepted, 1 held: partial fix-verdict coverage) -> loop SUSPENDED at the bound per the shipped policy. The held point had a deterministic fix the round-3 sidecar had wrongly deferred: ledger-id coverage now machine-checked (L1..Ln numbering, per-id verdict requirement, exact set comparison; id-less full-count fallback). No third cycle opened; the deciding round is the sanctioned close backstop. Suite: 3010 passed / 6 skipped.

Advisory path-aware critique produced (pull surface, google gemini-2.5-pro VERIFIED + openai gpt-5.4 ISSUES_FOUND with one Major: fixVerdicts has no machine record on a CLEAN remediation-review round because the Set 055 invariant forbids a clean-round envelope). Adjudication: the invariant is locked and correct; the CONTRACT DOCS overclaimed -- schema doc + writer docstring now state the raw stamp-bound artifact is the durable record on clean rounds, and the JSON schema gained the ledgerId item property (parity). Converged per L-070-1 (doc-wording change only, no code change). Next-set analysis routed (gemini-pro, $0.004: 095-patch first, then 077-redo); ai-assignment actuals filled; disposition.json authored (final session, next_orchestrator null); change-log.md written.

Close attempted twice; the Set 084 backstop ran rounds 5 and 6 in-process. Round 5: 2 Majors -- the ledger-id occurrence/re-coverage churn defect (REAL, fixed: previously-accepted ids now render EXEMPT and drop from the required coverage set, +1 test, suite 3011 passed) and the resurrected replay-comparison point (refused per the no-resurrection rule with the settlement evidence named in s2-remediation-round-5.md). Round 6: the B2 fix accepted; ONLY the resurrected point remains, re-raised in fresh wording after two explicit fix-accepted verdicts (rounds 3+4). Constitution stopping condition reached (never re-round a disputed finding): loop stopped, disposition -> requires_review, all work committed+pushed, adjudication package prepared for the operator. Second-provider datapoint on record: gemini-2.5-pro path-aware critic returned VERIFIED with no such finding.

Operator adjudication (2026-07-13, option c: reshaped-context re-verify). The operator supplied the objective context earlier rounds lacked: definitive comparative experiments are confounded beyond resolution and rejected as disproportionate for a personally-funded ~1-year-horizon tool whose staff users run weaker Copilot CLI models; the consequence rubric is operator policy, not a hypothesis under test; the replay is an indicative loop-shape demonstration by design. Round 7 (same verifier, gpt-5-6, full bundle + 27k-char auto-ledger, $0.37): VERIFIED, zero findings, explicitly grading the open point non-material for the deliverable's real users. record_adjudication logged (context-gap / reverify-reshaped); disposition restored to completed/VERIFIED. Operator follow-on candidates recorded: (a) background liberal-definition probe loop + triage queue (large), (b) per-project configurable severity definition (small).
